FLOW.COMMENT: this service needs to store these in a database

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: getActiveVars - get the current transaction variables 0-9 for the active transaction
Note that transaction variables are all saved in a single column in the transaction table under TRANSACTION_VARS. Each variable can
contain any normal string value as long as the total length of all variables does not exceed 4000. On the database, a tab character
is used as the delimiter between each variable.

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT TRANSACTION_VARS FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: SELECT TRANSACTION_VARS FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0512 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: FE0512 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sCurVars != $null
INVOKE.COMMENT: split the current set of vars on \t
